title: Pre-final: numbers in stories
description: Numbers mixed in real little stories
text: I have 3 cats and 2 dogs. We saw 5 birds. There are 10 stars. Mom baked 4 cakes. I read 6 books today!

character_tips.anna: Numbers IN stories. Real life writing.
character_tips.klavochka: Real little story with numbers, my dear 🌟
